tasks.label: Release
tasks.command: call "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Enterprise\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvarsall.bat" x64 && call "C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\oneAPI\setvars.bat" intel64 && cmake -S "${workspaceFolder}" -B "${workspaceFolder}\build" -G "Ninja Multi-Config" -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=cl -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=cl && cmake --build "${workspaceFolder}\build" --config Release

tasks.label: Debug
tasks.command: call "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Enterprise\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvarsall.bat" x64 && call "C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\oneAPI\setvars.bat" intel64 && cmake -S "${workspaceFolder}" -B "${workspaceFolder}\build" -G "Ninja Multi-Config" -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=cl -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=cl -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG="/fsanitize=address /Zi /INCREMENTAL:NO" && cmake --build "${workspaceFolder}\build" --config Debug

tasks.label: Debug Build (cmd env retry)
args: call "%ProgramFiles%\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Enterprise\VC\Auxiliary\Build\vcvarsall.bat" x64 && call "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Intel\oneAPI\setvars.bat" intel64 && cmake -S . -B build -G "Ninja Multi-Config" -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=cl -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=cl -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG="/fsanitize=address /Zi /INCREMENTAL:NO" && cmake --build build --config Debug

tasks.label: MCP: Start io.github.upstash/context7
tasks.command: if "%CONTEXT7_API_KEY%"=="" echo [WARN] CONTEXT7_API_KEY is empty. && start "mcp-context7" /B cmd /d /c "npx @upstash/context7-mcp@1.0.31"

tasks.label: MCP: Start oraios/serena
tasks.command: start "mcp-serena" /B cmd /d /c "uvx --from git+https://github.com/oraios/serena serena start-mcp-server --context ide-assistant --project ."

tasks.label: MCP: Start firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server
tasks.command: if "%FIRECRAWL_API_KEY%"=="" echo [WARN] FIRECRAWL_API_KEY is empty. && start "mcp-firecrawl" /B cmd /d /c "set FIRECRAWL_API_KEY=%FIRECRAWL_API_KEY%&& npx -y firecrawl-mcp@latest"

tasks.label: MCP: Auto Start on Folder Open
MCP: Stop All Local (stdio)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$targets = @('context7-mcp@1.0.31','serena start-mcp-server','markitdown-mcp@0.0.1a4','@playwright/mcp@latest','firecrawl-mcp@latest'); $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $cmd = $_.CommandLine; if (-not $cmd) { return $false }; $lc = $cmd.ToLowerInvariant(); foreach ($t in $targets) { if ($lc.Contains($t.ToLowerInvariant())) { return $true } }; return $false }; $count = 0; foreach ($p in $procs) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; $count++ } catch {} }; Write-Host ('Stopped MCP processes: ' + $count)"
